title: Mediterranean Deep-fried Shrimp Agemono
description: A pescatarian-friendly dish featuring shrimp, Mediterranean spices, and crispy fried goodness.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine shrimp paste kapi, garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the egg and mix well to combine.
Add the flour and mix until just combined.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Heat about 1/2 inch of olive oil in a copper pot over medium-high heat until it reaches 350°F.
Pour the breadcrumb mixture into the copper pot and cook, stirring constantly, until golden brown and crispy, about 2-3 minutes.
Using a slotted spoon, carefully add the shrimp to the copper pot and cook, stirring constantly, until pink and just cooked through, about 2-3 minutes.
Remove the shrimp from the copper pot with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain any excess oil.
Serve the shrimp hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
